docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206)
DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE FILED. RE: NOT FOUND RETURN (ERRONEOUS ADDRESS) ON DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NESTOR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTO RETURN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NESTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE FILED "NOT FOUND-RETURN SERVICE" ON DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NESTOR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
